x-enumeration-literals.name: Initial Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to record a new transaction, obligation, or asset in the system.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Adjustment Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to modify a previously recorded entry to correct errors, update amounts, or reflect changes in terms.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Reversal Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to reverse an earlier booking due to cancellation, error, or transaction rollback.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Scheduled Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to automatically record transactions at predefined dates or intervals (e.g., recurring accruals, interest postings).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Internal Transfer Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to record transfers of funds, assets, or obligations between accounts within the same institution.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Settlement Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to record the settlement of a transaction, including the transfer of funds or assets to finalize obligations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Accrual Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to record accrued income, expenses, interest, or fees that are recognized but not yet settled.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to record a transaction only when certain predefined conditions or triggers are met.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cross-Border Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to record transactions involving multiple currencies or jurisdictions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Audit or Reporting Booking Instruction
x-enumeration-literals.description: A request to create bookings for reconciliation, reporting, or regulatory compliance purposes.
